description: Canonical fixtures for wrap_hybrid F/B parity. Both backend pytest (Task 2) and frontend Playwright (Task 3) read this file. Each fixture's expected_* fields are the spec — implementations must match exactly.

algorithm_summary.tiebreak: later position wins on equal score
passes: Pass 1: BH range [n-hard_cap, n//2+tail_tolerance] — best unlocked scoring break
Pass 2: full hard-cap range [n-hard_cap, hard_cap] — best unlocked scoring break
Pass 3: any unlocked scoring break in [1, n-1] (hard_cut=true since outside hard-cap)
Pass 4: forced cut at min(hard_cap, n//2); hard_cut=true; lock_violated=true
algorithm_summary.above_band1_below_truncate: always go to 2-line algorithm; band 2 single-line only fires when max_lines=1 or when 2-line cannot produce result
algorithm_summary.locked_semantics: locked_positions[i] forbidden as break position; break at p splits into text[0:p] | text[p:n]; valid range [1, n-1]

fixtures._note: Empty input short-circuit: lines=[].

fixtures.input: 皇馬告急
fixtures._note: n=4 ≤ soft+tail=16: band 1, 1 line, no flags.

fixtures.input: 皇馬奪冠了
fixtures._note: n=5 ≤ soft+tail: band 1, 1 line.

fixtures.input: 球隊夏窗大刀闊斧大重建在所難
expected_lines: 球隊夏窗大刀闊斧大重建在所難
fixtures._note: n=14 = soft_cap, well within band 1 (≤16). 1 line, no flags.

fixtures.input: 球隊夏窗大刀闊斧大重建在所難免發
expected_lines: 球隊夏窗大刀闊斧大重建在所難免發
fixtures._note: n=16 = soft+tail boundary: band 1 includes equality, 1 line, no flags.

fixtures.input: 皇馬奪冠了。
fixtures._note: n=6, ends with 「。」, fits band 1: 1 line.

fixtures.input: Real Madrid lost
fixtures._note: ASCII-only string, n=16 = soft+tail. Band 1, 1 line, no flags. Each grapheme (incl spaces) counted as 1 char.

fixtures.input: 2026年1月阿朗素離任皇馬轉投英超
fixtures._note: n=18, > soft+tail=16. Goes to 2-line algorithm. No scoring punctuation. Pass 1, 2, 3 all fail. Pass 4 forced cut at min(hard_cap=16, n//2=9)=9. text idx: 2(0) 0(1) 2(2) 6(3) 年(4) 1(5) 月(6) 阿(7) 朗(8) 素(9) 離(10) 任(11) 皇(12) 馬(13) 轉(14) 投(15) 英(16) 超(17). Cut at p=9: line1=「2026年1月阿朗」 (9c), line2=「素離任皇馬轉投英超」 (9c). Both ≤ soft_cap=14. Equal length → no BH violation.

fixtures.input: 球隊夏窗大刀闊斧大重建吧
expected_lines: 球隊夏窗大刀闊斧大重建吧
fixtures._note: tail=0. n=12 ≤ soft+tail=14: band 1, 1 line.

fixtures.input: 球隊夏窗大刀闊斧大重建在所難免大
expected_lines: 球隊夏窗大刀闊斧大重建在所難免大
fixtures._note: tail=4. n=16 ≤ soft+tail=18: band 1, 1 line.

fixtures.input: 球隊真正需要的，是夏窗大刀闊斧的重建
expected_lines: 是夏窗大刀闊斧的重建
fixtures._note: n=18. > soft+tail=16, so 2-line. BH range [2,11]: p=8 SOFT 「，」 score 50. line1=8c, line2=10c. BH OK.

fixtures.input: 在後防方面，傷病纏身令皇馬後防嚴重告急
expected_lines: 傷病纏身令皇馬後防嚴重告急
fixtures._note: n=19. BH range [3,11]: p=6 SOFT 「，」 only. line1=6c, line2=13c. BH preferred.

fixtures.input: 球隊真正需要的，是夏窗大刀闊斧的重建
expected_lines: 是夏窗大刀闊斧的重建
fixtures._note: soft=hard=14. n=18 > soft+tail=16, 2-line. BH range [4, 11]: p=8 SOFT only. line1=8c, line2=10c.

fixtures.input: 球員（西班牙）將會離隊投奔英超球會
expected_lines: 將會離隊投奔英超球會
fixtures._note: n=17, > soft+tail=16. BH range [1,10]: p=2 POPEN 「（」 score 25, p=7 PCLOSE 「）」 score 30. Higher score wins → p=7. line1=7c, line2=10c.

fixtures.input: 皇馬今天告急（球員陣容嚴重老化）的問題很大
expected_lines: （球員陣容嚴重老化）的問題很大
fixtures._note: n=21. BH range [5,12]: p=6 POPEN 「（」 score 25 only. p=16 PCLOSE 「）」 outside BH. Pass 1 picks p=6. line1=6c, line2=15c. line2>soft_cap=14 → soft_overflow. BH OK (6<15).

fixtures.input: 球員傷病。但皇馬，陣容大洗牌已勢在必行
expected_lines: 但皇馬，陣容大洗牌已勢在必行
fixtures._note: n=19. BH range [3,11]: p=5 HARD 「。」 score 100, p=9 SOFT 「，」 score 50. HARD wins. line1=5c, line2=14c. line2=14=soft_cap (not >) so no flag.

fixtures.input: 球員，皇馬，陣容已經大洗牌而勢在必行了
expected_lines: 陣容已經大洗牌而勢在必行了
fixtures._note: n=19. BH range [3,11]: p=3 SOFT 「，」 50, p=6 SOFT 「，」 50. Tie → later wins (p=6). line1=6c, line2=13c.

fixtures.input: 球員，皇馬，陣容已經大洗牌而勢在必行了
expected_lines: 皇馬，陣容已經大洗牌而勢在必行了
fixtures._note: Same input as above but lock p=6. BH range [3,11]: p=3 SOFT 50, p=6 LOCKED. Best=p=3. line1=3c, line2=16c. line2=16>soft_cap=14 → soft_overflow. BH OK.

fixtures.input: 球員傷病。但皇馬，陣容大洗牌已勢在必行
expected_lines: 但皇馬，陣容大洗牌已勢在必行
fixtures._note: Identical to hard_priority test. Confirms empty locked = no constraint.

fixtures.input: 在防守方面，皇馬今季傷病困擾。陣容老化
expected_lines: 在防守方面，皇馬今季傷病困擾。
fixtures._note: n=19. BH range [3,11]: p=6 SOFT 「，」 LOCKED. No other scoring in range. Pass 1 fails. Pass 2 range [3,16]: p=15 HARD 「。」 score 100. line1=15c (>soft_cap=14 → soft_overflow), line2=4c (line1>line2 → BH violation). hard_cut=false (within hard-cap).

fixtures.input: 我地球員傷病要打仗的皇馬已經告急了，正常
expected_lines: 我地球員傷病要打仗的皇馬已經告急了，
fixtures._note: n=20. Only scoring break is p=18 SOFT 「，」 (outside Pass 2 range [4,16]). Pass 1, 2 fail. Pass 3 finds p=18 → hard_cut=true (no scoring in hard-cap), soft_overflow (line1=18>14), BH violation (18>2).

fixtures.input: 球隊真正需要的是夏窗大刀闊斧的重建
fixtures._note: n=17. ALL break positions [1..16] locked. No scoring chars anyway. Pass 1, 2, 3 all fail. Pass 4 forced at min(16, 17//2=8)=8. line1=8c, line2=9c. Both ≤ soft_cap. BH OK. lock_violated=true.

fixtures.input: 球員傷病皇馬告急陣容大洗牌而老化嚴重不
expected_lines: 容大洗牌而老化嚴重不
fixtures._note: n=19. No scoring chars. No locks but no break candidates. Pass 1, 2, 3 fail. Pass 4 cut at min(16, 19//2=9)=9. line1=9c, line2=10c. Both ≤ soft_cap. BH OK. hard_cut+lock_violated.

fixtures.input: AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA
fixtures._note: n=36 > 2*hard_cap=32. Truncate band: lines=[text[0:16], text[16:32]]. hard_cut+soft_overflow.

fixtures.input: BBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB
fixtures._note: n=32 = 2*hard_cap (NOT >, so not truncate band). 2-line algo: no scoring chars. Pass 1, 2, 3 fail. Pass 4 cut at min(16, 16)=16. lines=[B*16, B*16]. Both =16 > soft_cap=14 → soft_overflow. Equal lengths → no BH violation. lock_violated=true (Pass 4).

fixtures.input: CCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCC
fixtures._note: n=33 > 2*hard_cap=32 → truncate (drops the last 'C'). hard_cut+soft_overflow.

fixtures.input: 球員傷病，但皇馬今日告急。
fixtures._note: soft=8 hard=10 tail=2. n=13 > soft+tail=10, > hard+tail=12. 2-line. BH range [3, 8]: p=5 SOFT 「，」 50 only. line1=5c, line2=8c. Both ≤ soft_cap=8. BH OK. (Last 「。」 at p=13=n, not a valid break.)

fixtures.input: 在後防方面傷病纏身令皇馬後防嚴重告急
expected_lines: 在後防方面傷病纏身令皇馬後防嚴重告急
fixtures._note: max_lines=1 forces single line. n=18 ≤ hard+tail=18: band 2 single-line with soft_overflow flag (n>soft_cap). BH violation N/A in 1-line.

fixtures.input: 好的。然後球員嚴重傷病了。陣容老化
expected_lines: 然後球員嚴重傷病了。陣容老化
fixtures._note: n=17 > soft+tail=16. BH range [1,10]: p=3 HARD 「。」 score 100 (only HARD in BH range; second 「。」 at p=13 is outside BH range [1,10]). Pass 1 picks p=3. line1=3c, line2=14c. line2=14=soft_cap (not >) so no flag.

fixtures.input: 球員，皇馬告急老化嚴重，陣容大洗牌已勢在必行
expected_lines: 球員，皇馬告急老化嚴重，
陣容大洗牌已勢在必行
fixtures._note: n=22. BH range [6,13]: p=12 SOFT 「，」 score 50 (only candidate in range; p=3 SOFT outside). Pass 1 picks p=12. line1=12c, line2=10c. line1>line2 → BH violation flag (algorithm took best-scored break in BH range even though result is mildly top-heavy). Both ≤ soft_cap → no soft_overflow.
